description_long: This house features a striking modern design with bold horizontal and vertical lines, characterized by a mix of black, white, and green striped surfaces. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, with a prominent flat roof and large open spaces, including a visible outdoor patio area. A spacious swimming pool with blue water and white edging is integrated into the landscape, adjacent to a green-striped lawn. The windows are large and arranged in asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is sheltered by an overhanging roof and is accessible from the green lawn, with no visible steps or porch. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and open, functional spaces.
description: A modern, geometric house with bold black, white, and green stripes, flat roofs, large windows, and an integrated swimming pool. The design features open spaces and a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, overhanging roof, and a clear view of the green-striped lawn and pool to the right.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the patio area, open outdoor seating, and the full length of the swimming pool.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the pool's edge, the house's layered volumes, and the striped lawn extending to the left.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the flat roof, open patio, and the intersection of the house's geometric forms.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhanging roof, no visible steps or porch, minimalist and open design
